testcase.name: test_goods_add_mutiSku_publish
testcase.error:
self = <tests.scripts.goods.test_goods_add_mutisku_publish_onsale_001.Test_goods_add_mutiSku_publish_001 object at 0x7f5248d6e908>
@pytest.fixture() def ini(self): self.goods = Goods() self.logger = Logger.Logger() self.addPostageParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addPostage.json") self.addSpecTemplateParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addSpecTemplate.json") self.addGoodsParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addMutiSkuGoods.json") self.specTemplate = SpecTemplate() self.postage = Postage() # 新增商品，保存 addGoodsRes = self.goods.addGoods(self.addPostageParam, self.addSpecTemplateParam, self.addGoodsParam) self.logger.info("addGoodRes: {0}".format(addGoodsRes.json())) assert addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] is not None self.spuId = addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] self.publishGoodsParam = {"spu_id":self.spuId} # 发布上面新增的商品 publishRes = self.goods.publishGoods(self.publishGoodsParam) self.logger.info("publishRes: {0}".format(publishRes.json())) # print("addGoodRes: {0}".format(publishRes.json())) assert publishRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] is not None self.saleParam = {"spu_id": [], "sku_id": []} self.saleParam["spu_id"].append(self.spuId)
yield self.saleParam,self.addPostageParam, self.addSpecTemplateParam, self.addGoodsParam,self.specTemplate # 下架商品 offsaleParam = self.saleParam offsaleRes = self.goods.offsaleGoods(offsaleParam) self.logger.info("osssale goods res ]info {0}".format(offsaleRes)) print("offsaleRes: {0}".format(offsaleRes))
# 删除添加的商品 delGoods = {"channel_type":1,"spu_id": self.spuId} delRes = self.goods.delSpu(delGoods).json() assert delRes["code"] == 200 and delRes["message"] == "success" print("delGoods: {0}".format(delRes)) # 删除规格模板 self.delSpecParam = {"attribute_template_id": self.specTemplateId} delRes = self.specTemplate.deleteSpecTemplate(self.delSpecParam) assert delRes.status_code == 200 # 删除邮费模板 for postageID in self.postageIdList: delParam = {"postage_id":postageID} delRes = self.postage.delete_postage(delParam) self.logger.info("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) print("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) > assert delRes.status_code == 200 and delRes.json()["message"] == "success" E assert (500 == 200 E +500 E -200)
tests/scripts/goods/test_goods_add_mutisku_publish_onsale_001.py:71: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_goods_add_mutiSku_publish
testcase.error:
self = <tests.scripts.goods.test_goods_add_mutisku_publish_onsale_003.Test_goods_add_mutiSku_publish_003 object at 0x7f5248bc8780>
@pytest.fixture() def ini(self): self.goods = Goods() self.logger = Logger.Logger() self.addPostageParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addPostage.json") self.addSpecTemplateParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addSpecTemplate.json") self.addGoodsParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addMutiSkuGoods.json") self.specTemplate = SpecTemplate() self.postage = Postage() # 新增商品，保存 addGoodsRes = self.goods.addGoods(self.addPostageParam, self.addSpecTemplateParam, self.addGoodsParam) self.logger.info("addGoodRes: {0}".format(addGoodsRes.json())) assert addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] is not None self.spuId = addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] self.publishGoodsParam = {"spu_id":self.spuId} # 发布上面新增的商品 publishRes = self.goods.publishGoods(self.publishGoodsParam) self.logger.info("publishRes: {0}".format(publishRes.json())) # print("addGoodRes: {0}".format(publishRes.json())) assert publishRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] is not None self.saleParam = {"spu_id": [], "sku_id": []} self.saleParam["spu_id"].append(self.spuId)
yield self.saleParam,self.addPostageParam, self.addSpecTemplateParam, self.addGoodsParam,self.specTemplate # 下架商品 offsaleParam = self.saleParam offsaleRes = self.goods.offsaleGoods(offsaleParam) self.logger.info("osssale goods res ]info {0}".format(offsaleRes)) print("offsaleRes: {0}".format(offsaleRes))
# 删除添加的商品 delGoods = {"channel_type":1,"spu_id": self.spuId} delRes = self.goods.delSpu(delGoods).json() assert delRes["code"] == 200 and delRes["message"] == "success" print("delGoods: {0}".format(delRes)) # 删除规格模板 self.delSpecParam = {"attribute_template_id": self.specTemplateId} delRes = self.specTemplate.deleteSpecTemplate(self.delSpecParam) assert delRes.status_code == 200 # 删除邮费模板 for postageID in self.postageIdList: delParam = {"postage_id":postageID} delRes = self.postage.delete_postage(delParam) self.logger.info("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) print("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) > assert delRes.status_code == 200 and delRes.json()["message"] == "success" E assert (500 == 200 E +500 E -200)
tests/scripts/goods/test_goods_add_mutisku_publish_onsale_003.py:70: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_goods_add_noPostage

skipped.message: 接口符合要求的情况下，增加商品会失败，目前会成功，造成环境脏数据

testcase.skipped: /data/jenkins/workspace/PostmanApi/tests/scripts/goods/test_goods_add_noPostage_001.py:64: 接口符合要求的情况下，增加商品会失败，目前会成功，造成环境脏数据

testcase.name: test_goods_copyGoods
testcase.error:
self = <tests.scripts.goods.test_goods_copyGoods_005.Test_goods_copyGoods object at 0x7f5248ca0ac8>
@pytest.fixture() def ini(self): self.goods = Goods() self.logger = Logger.Logger() self.postage = Postage() self.specTemplate = SpecTemplate() self.addPostageParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addPostage.json") self.addSpecTemplateParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addSpecTemplate.json") self.addGoodsParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addMutiSkuGoods.json") # 新增商品，保存 addGoodsRes = self.goods.addGoods(self.addPostageParam, self.addSpecTemplateParam, self.addGoodsParam) self.logger.info("addGoodRes: {0}".format(addGoodsRes.json())) assert addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] is not None # 查询未发布商品列表的第一条数据 listParam = {"page": 1, "size": 1, "searchParams": {"searchReleaseStatus": 0}} listRes = self.goods.listSpu(listParam) self.logger.info("listRes: {0}".format(listRes)) assert listRes["data"]["list"][0]["id"] == addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] self.spuId = addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"]
yield self.addPostageParam,self.addGoodsParam,self.addSpecTemplateParam,self.spuId
# 删除添加的商品 delGoods = {"channel_type": 1, "spu_id": self.spuId} print("&&&&&&&", delGoods) delRes = self.goods.delSpu(delGoods).json() assert delRes["code"] == 200 and delRes["message"] == "success" print("delGoods1: {0}".format(delRes)) # 删除复制的商品 delGoods = {"channel_type": 1, "spu_id": self.copySpuId} delRes = self.goods.delSpu(delGoods).json() assert delRes["code"] == 200 and delRes["message"] == "success" print("delGoods2: {0}".format(delRes)) # 删除规格模板 self.delSpecParam = {"attribute_template_id": self.specTemplateId} delRes = self.specTemplate.deleteSpecTemplate(self.delSpecParam) assert delRes.status_code == 200 # 删除邮费模板 for postageID in self.postageIdList: delParam = {"postage_id":postageID} delRes = self.postage.delete_postage(delParam) self.logger.info("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) print("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) > assert delRes.status_code == 200 and delRes.json()["message"] == "success" E assert (500 == 200 E +500 E -200)
tests/scripts/goods/test_goods_copyGoods_005.py:66: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_goods_copyGoods
testcase.error:
self = <tests.scripts.goods.test_goods_copyGoods_007.Test_goods_copyGoods object at 0x7f5248d75b70>
@pytest.fixture() def ini(self): self.goods = Goods() self.logger = Logger.Logger() self.postage = Postage() self.specTemplate = SpecTemplate() self.addPostageParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addPostage.json") self.addSpecTemplateParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addSpecTemplate.json") self.addGoodsParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addMutiSkuGoods.json") # 新增商品，保存 addGoodsRes = self.goods.addGoods(self.addPostageParam, self.addSpecTemplateParam, self.addGoodsParam) self.logger.info("addGoodRes: {0}".format(addGoodsRes.json())) assert addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] is not None # 查询未发布商品列表的第一条数据 listParam = {"page": 1, "size": 1, "searchParams": {"searchReleaseStatus": 0}} listRes = self.goods.listSpu(listParam) self.logger.info("listRes: {0}".format(listRes)) assert listRes["data"]["list"][0]["id"] == addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] self.spuId = addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] self.publishGoodsParam = {"spu_id": self.spuId} # 发布上面新增的商品 publishRes = self.goods.publishGoods(self.publishGoodsParam) self.logger.info("publishRes: {0}".format(publishRes.json())) # print("addGoodRes: {0}".format(publishRes.json())) assert publishRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] is not None # 上架商品 self.saleParam = {"spu_id": [], "sku_id": []} self.saleParam["spu_id"].append(self.spuId) saleRes = self.goods.saleGoods(self.saleParam) self.logger.info("saleRes: {0}".format(saleRes)) # print("saleRes: {0}".format(saleRes)) assert saleRes["data"]["fail_num"] == 0
yield self.addPostageParam, self.addGoodsParam, self.addSpecTemplateParam, self.spuId
# 下架商品 offsaleParam = self.saleParam offsaleRes = self.goods.offsaleGoods(offsaleParam) self.logger.info("osssale goods res ]info {0}".format(offsaleRes)) print("offsaleRes: {0}".format(offsaleRes))
# 删除添加的商品 delGoods = {"channel_type": 1, "spu_id": self.spuId} print("&&&&&&&", delGoods) delRes = self.goods.delSpu(delGoods).json() assert delRes["code"] == 200 and delRes["message"] == "success" print("delGoods1: {0}".format(delRes)) # 删除复制的商品 delGoods = {"channel_type": 1, "spu_id": self.copySpuId} delRes = self.goods.delSpu(delGoods).json() assert delRes["code"] == 200 and delRes["message"] == "success" print("delGoods2: {0}".format(delRes))
# 删除规格模板 self.delSpecParam = {"attribute_template_id": self.specTemplateId} delRes = self.specTemplate.deleteSpecTemplate(self.delSpecParam) assert delRes.status_code == 200 # 删除邮费模板 for postageID in self.postageIdList: delParam = {"postage_id": postageID} delRes = self.postage.delete_postage(delParam) self.logger.info("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) print("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) > assert delRes.status_code == 200 and delRes.json()["message"] == "success" E assert (500 == 200 E +500 E -200)
tests/scripts/goods/test_goods_copyGoods_007.py:90: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_goods_publishGoods
testcase.error:
self = <tests.scripts.goods.test_goods_update_002.Test_goods_updateGoods_002 object at 0x7f52485690b8>
@pytest.fixture() def ini(self): self.goods = Goods() self.logger = Logger.Logger() self.specTemplate = SpecTemplate() self.postage = Postage() self.addPostageParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addPostage.json") self.addSpecTemplateParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addSpecTemplate.json") self.addGoodsParam = ReaderFile.readerJson("addGoods.json") #新增商品，保存 addGoodsRes = self.goods.addGoods(self.addPostageParam, self.addSpecTemplateParam, self.addGoodsParam) self.logger.info("addGoodRes: {0}".format(addGoodsRes.json())) assert addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] is not None self.publishGoodsParam = addGoodsRes.json()["data"] # 查询新增的邮费模板 params = {"page": "1", "size": "1"} res = self.postage.query_postage(params) # 查询时间区间内邮费模板数据 self.logger.info("Query postage res info {0}".format(res)) assert len(res["data"]["list"]) == 1 and res["data"]["list"][0]["name"] == self.addPostageParam["name"] self.oldpostageID = res["data"]["list"][0]["id"] print("8888888： ",self.oldpostageID) # 发布上面新增的商品 publishRes = self.goods.publishGoods(self.publishGoodsParam) self.logger.info("publishRes: {0}".format(publishRes.json())) # print("addGoodRes: {0}".format(publishRes.json())) assert publishRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"] is not None self.spuId = addGoodsRes.json()["data"]["spu_id"]
# 新增一个用于修改的邮费模板 startTime = Mytime.getCurrTimeStamp() time.sleep(1) self.addPostageParam["name"] = "修改的邮费模板" res = self.postage.addPostage(self.addPostageParam) # 调接口创建邮费模板 endTime = Mytime.getCurrTimeStamp() self.logger.info("add postage template res: {0}".format(res)) assert res.status_code == 200 and "success" in res.text # 查询新增的邮费模板 params = {"page": "", "size": "", "start_time": startTime, "end_time": endTime, "time_type": ""} res = self.postage.query_postage(params) # 查询时间区间内邮费模板数据 self.logger.info("Query postage res info {0}".format(res)) assert len(res["data"]["list"]) == 1 and res["data"]["list"][0]["name"] == self.addPostageParam["name"] self.postageID = res["data"]["list"][0]["id"] print("99999999: ",self.postageID)
yield self.publishGoodsParam,self.spuId,self.postageID,self.oldpostageID # 删除新建商品时新增的邮费模板 delParam = {"postage_id": self.oldpostageID} delRes = self.postage.delete_postage(delParam) self.logger.info("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) print("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) assert delRes.status_code == 200 and delRes.json()["message"] == "success"
# 删除添加的商品 delGoods = {"channel_type": 1, "spu_id": self.spuId} delRes = self.goods.delSpu(delGoods).json() assert delRes["code"] == 200 and delRes["message"] == "success" print("delGoods: {0}".format(delRes)) # 删除规格模板 self.delSpecParam = {"attribute_template_id": self.specTemplateId} delRes = self.specTemplate.deleteSpecTemplate(self.delSpecParam) assert delRes.status_code == 200 # 删除邮费模板 for postageID in self.postageIdList: delParam = {"postage_id": postageID} delRes = self.postage.delete_postage(delParam) self.logger.info("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) print("delRes {0}".format(delRes.json())) > assert delRes.status_code == 200 and delRes.json()["message"] == "success" E assert (500 == 200 E +500 E -200)
tests/scripts/goods/test_goods_update_002.py:88: AssertionError

testcase.name: https://crs-api.vchangyi.com/boss/app/v1/admin/login响应数据中usernamed的值为：'创业翼超管'

testsuite.name: BOSS / 企业可用应用列表（旧）
BOSS / 企业付费信息统计
BOSS / 企业支付记录列表

testcase.name: https://shop-api-crs.vchangyi.com/gw-shop/get_token?enterprise_id=16&size=1&type=2&has_mobile=1可以获取用户token

failure.message: Unexpected token '签' at 1:1 签名错误 ^

testcase.failure:
Failed 1 times.
Collection JSON ID: 2aa5d76c-6a14-49e2-ad2f-e78f889cdea5.
Collection name: API.
Request name: Applets / Mocklogin.
Test description: https://shop-api-crs.vchangyi.com/gw-shop/get_token?enterprise_id=16&size=1&type=2&has_mobile=1可以获取用户token.
Error message: Unexpected token '签' at 1:1 签名错误 ^.
Stacktrace: JSONError: Unexpected token '签' at 1:1 签名错误 ^ at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:44).
